scripts.build: npm run build --prefix vendor/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.postinstall: npm run build --prefix vendor/shared && prisma generate
scripts.test: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/blindspot_test REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 JWT_SECRET=test-jwt-secret-test-jwt-secret-test-jwt-secret-1234 JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=test-refresh-secret-test-refresh-secret-1234567 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=test STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_mock STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_mock STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID=price_mock NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3101 NEXTAUTH_SECRET=test-nextauth-secret-test-nextauth-secret-12345 NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000 vitest run --coverage
